product_subtype.description: Optional narrower product-use subtype such as indoor_surface_insecticide or surface_trigger_spray_disinfectant.
product_subtype.title: Product Subtype

intendedUseFamily.description: Optional intended-use family such as medicinal, supplement, food, cosmetic, cleaning, or pesticidal. This is carried for clearer suite routing and review.

oralExposureContext.description: Optional oral pathway routing tag used to distinguish direct-use medicinal or supplement regimens from incidental, food-mediated, or environmental-media oral semantics.

aerosolCarrierFamily.description: Optional explicit aerosol carrier family such as hydrocarbon_propellant_solvent or water_ethanol_propellant when formulation-level spray semantics are known.

aerosolFormulationProfile.description: Optional explicit aerosol formulation profile such as anhydrous_ethanol_propellant, water_quat_propellant, or high_solids_polymer_propellant when formulation-specific spray semantics are known.

physical_form.title: Physical Form

application_method.title: Application Method

retention_type.description: Retention class such as leave_on or rinse_off.

concentration_fraction.description: Fraction of the target chemical in the product, 0-1.
concentration_fraction.title: Concentration Fraction

use_amount_unit.description: Unit for the use amount per event.

dosageUnitCountPerEvent.description: Optional count of tablets, capsules, pills, sachets, or similar dosage units used per event for oral solid or discrete-dose direct-use regimens.

dosageUnitMassG.description: Optional product mass per dosage unit in grams when oral or discrete-dose regimens are represented as counted tablets, capsules, or pills.
dosageUnitMassG.title: Dosageunitmassg

dosageUnitLabel.description: Optional dosage-unit label such as tablet, capsule, pill, sachet, or lozenge used to make direct-use oral-solid semantics auditable.
dosageUnitLabel.title: Dosageunitlabel

use_events_per_day.description: Number of product-use events per day.
use_events_per_day.title: Use Events Per Day

density_g_per_ml.description: Density when the product amount is in mL.
density_g_per_ml.title: Density G Per Ml

applicationStripLengthCm.title: Applicationstriplengthcm

applicationCoverageContext.description: Optional topical application coverage note such as palm_sized_area or lower_leg when product instructions define geometry by treated area.
applicationCoverageContext.title: Applicationcoveragecontext

aerosolized_fraction.title: Aerosolized Fraction
